summary: Remove language in the state constitution that allows the legislature to have between 30 and 35 legislative districts and instead requiring the legislature to consist of 35 districts. [ 48 ]

measure_name: Nevada Question 1, Remove Constitutional Status of Board of Regents Amendment

measure_name: Wisconsin Marsy's Law Crime Victims Rights Amendment
